message:
fix(runtime): reject invalid adapter modes in vertical adapter evaluation

Add explicit mode validation in asx_adapter_evaluate() — modes other than
FALLBACK and ACCELERATED now return ASX_E_INVALID_ARGUMENT instead of
falling through to undefined behavior. Header doc updated to document the
new error contract.

- New test: evaluate_invalid_mode_rejected
- Close beads issue bd-8tjb

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
